mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board A WHERE A.board_type = 'NOTICE'
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND A.rqst_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT A.rqst_no, A.title, A.cont, A.rqst_id, A.ins_dt, A.upt_dt, A.views, A.group_no, A.parent_no, A.depth, A.order_no, A.secret, A.password FROM board A WHERE A.rqst_no = #{rqstNo} AND A.board_type = 'NOTICE'
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET views = views + 1 WHERE rqst_no = #{rqstNo} AND board_type = 'NOTICE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (rqst_no, title, cont, rqst_id, ins_dt, upt_dt, views, group_no, parent_no, depth, order_no, secret, password, board_type) VALUES (#{rqstNo}, #{title}, #{cont}, #{rqstId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0, #{groupNo}, #{parentNo}, #{depth}, #{orderNo}, #{secret}, #{password}, 'NOTICE')
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET title=#{title}, cont=#{cont}, upt_dt=NOW(), secret=#{secret} WHERE rqst_no=#{rqstNo} AND board_type='NOTICE'
UPDATE board SET order_no = order_no + 1 WHERE group_no = #{groupNo} AND order_no > #{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, board_type, ref_id, rqst_id, cont, ins_dt, upt_dt, likes, dislikes FROM comment WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} ORDER BY ins_dt ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (board_type, ref_id, rqst_id, cont, ins_dt) VALUES ('NOTICE', #{refId}, #{rqstId}, #{cont}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, board_type, ref_id, rqst_id, cont, ins_dt, upt_dt, likes, dislikes FROM comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET likes = likes - 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET dislikes = dislikes + 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET dislikes = dislikes - 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
